
Camila Suárez
DevOps Engineer

Please contact me at camila.suarez@example.com or +54 911 2222 2222 for
any inquiries regarding the Experience section of this CV.

My Education at the Universidad Tecnológica Nacional (2014 - 2019)
includes a thesis on Kubernetes operator patterns.

Historia laboral
— Phi Systems (2021 - 2024): Platform Engineer. Built the internal
  developer platform on top of Kubernetes and Argo.
— Chi Cloud (2019 - 2021): SRE. Owned the observability stack.

Certificaciones: CKA (2022), CKAD (2023), Terraform Associate (2024).

Idiomas: español nativo, inglés avanzado.
